summary: MCP server 401/403 error hints corrected to name GODADDY_API_KEY/GODADDY_API_SECRET; removed the misleading 'this API is configured without credentials' 403 text.
reason: Auth-hint sweep: the MCP tool error path carried the same 'configured without credentials' bug already fixed in the CLI's helpers.go 403 hint, plus a generic 401 hint. GoDaddy requires credentials, so the old MCP hints misled agents into ignoring missing/under-scoped keys.
